verdicts.reason: It identifies a living being’s long-term presence within one place, though the location clause is redundant.
It sharply and economically renders the sense as living in a particular place for a long time.
The long-term living-in-a-place differentia is present, but the disconnected HAPPEN clause is idle and loosely constructed.
It renders long-term living and presence in the same place, with unnecessary duplication.
It captures living in one place for a long time, while the additional presence-at-many-times clause is redundant.
